title: Trump hits back at critics as Iran peace deal fuels debate over U.S. concessions
summary_full: The deal sees both sides commit to further talks to reach a final agreement over the next 60 days and includes a $300 billion plan for Iran's reconstruction.
summary_public: The deal sees both sides commit to further talks to reach a final agreement over the next 60 days and includes a $300 billion plan for Iran's reconstruction.

IR.label: positive
